title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Atul Projects

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Atul Projects
jsonLd.description:
Atul Projects has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Atul Projects:
Atul Projects is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atul Projects!
